bird.name: White-winged flufftail
bird.summary: The white-winged flufftail (Sarothrura ayresi) is a very rare African bird in the family Sarothruridae. The estimated global population siz…

relations.subject: White-winged flufftail
relations.evidence: Their natural habitat is highly specialized seasonal marshland of subtropical or tropical high-altitude grassland
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: White-winged flufftail
relations.evidence: The species is severely threatened by habitat loss, causes of which include grass trampling by cattle, grass cutting and drainage of swamps for pasture
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.object_summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。
